response.justification: Strong distributed-systems engineer with recent agentic AI involvement, but lacks essential CTO requirements: no demonstrated executive team leadership (scaling to 10–30+ people), zero fintech infrastructure experience, and only six months of agentic AI production work with unclear depth. Position demands proven organizational leadership and domain expertise; candidate is a technical architect, not an executive leader.
strengths: Expert in distributed systems and real-time backend architecture (Dunnhumby: millions of requests/second; Optilyz and GISCollective: event-driven, scalable platforms)
Current hands-on involvement with agentic AI frameworks (MCP code generators, agent orchestration) at re:cinq since April 2025
20 years of engineering experience with strong technical craftsmanship, TDD discipline, and multi-language fluency
concerns: No demonstrated executive leadership: zero mention of hiring, mentoring technical leaders, or scaling teams from 10–30+ people—core CTO responsibility
Complete absence of fintech infrastructure experience (credit systems, payment flows, embedded finance, compliance infrastructure all required)
Agentic AI production experience limited to recent six months; no evidence of production failure modes, LLM evaluation methodology, or AI system reliability at scale
